Validation_VAL_Profile_Minimum

fsh-generated/resources/ImplementationGuide-smart.who.int.dak-immz.jsonImplementationGuide.experimental: minimum required = 1, but only found 0 (from http://smart.who.int/base/StructureDefinition/SGImplementationGuide|0.1.0)

_DT_Fixed_Wrong

fsh-generated/resources/ImplementationGuide-smart.who.int.dak-immz.jsonValue is 'CC0-1.0' but is fixed to 'CC-BY-SA-3.0-IGO' in the profile http://smart.who.int/base/StructureDefinition/SGImplementationGuide|0.1.0#ImplementationGuide.license
